title: Design Planning Architect Output
description: Required fields for output produced by the Design Planning Architect before any implementation agent is invoked. Compliance is instruction-enforced, not constrained-decoding enforced.

workPackage.description: Short kebab-case identifier or human-readable name for this design unit

createdAt.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when this plan was produced

inquiryChecklist.description: Minimum inquiry criteria that must all be satisfied before plan is considered approved

filesExamined.description: List of file paths read during codebase research phase. Minimum length defined by inquiry.minimumFilesExamined in solar.config.json.

ambiguitiesResolved.description: List of requirement ambiguities that were resolved prior to plan approval. Empty array is valid only if no ambiguities existed.

planApproved.description: True when the governor or user has acknowledged this plan. Set to false while plan is still draft.

problemFraming.description: Clear statement of the problem being solved and its scope boundary

constraintsAndAssumptions.description: Explicit constraints (things that cannot change) and assumptions (things believed to be true but not verified)

proposedWorkPackages.description: Ordered list of bounded work items to delegate to implementation agents

targetAgent.description: Name of the specialist agent that should receive this package

filesToModify.description: Paths of files to be created or modified

testStrategy.description: Brief test coverage plan for this package

verificationTarget.description: Path to a verification-artifacts/target-*.json file if spec-first mode was used

risksAndTradeoffs.description: Identified risks and architectural tradeoffs with their mitigations

recommendedNextDelegation.description: Agent name the governor should delegate to first after plan approval
